name: minecraft-reel-editor
description: Turn messy narrated Minecraft recordings into approved, polished vertical reels using local transcription and FFmpeg.

interface.shortDescription: Cut messy Minecraft takes into a polished reel.
interface.longDescription: Transcribe a narrated Minecraft recording locally, propose an exact-word edit for approval, then cut takes, tighten pauses, frame vertically, and burn pixel captions.
defaultPrompt: Edit my narrated Minecraft recording into a reel.
